response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 96
REASON: No such EPA Final Rule exists at 91 Fed. Reg. 18,442 or elsewhere; 40 CFR §120 covers different subject matter, Section 404 permits are administered by the Army Corps (not EPA alone), and the substantive provisions (blanket wetland-fill exemptions with no Corps notice) are inconsistent with actual CWA regulatory framework even post-Sackett.
